---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**What you expected**
What should have happened instead.

**To reproduce**
The exact command(s) you ran:
```
.\dl2.exe -url ...
```

**Environment**
- OS:
- Go version (`go version`):
- dl2 version/commit:
- Mode used (queue / adaptive / swarm / API server):

**Full output**
```
paste the full terminal output here, including any errors
```

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant — network conditions, file size, whether this is
reproducible every time or intermittent.
